title: sorghum tropicum
intro: Sorghum tropicum, also known as broom sorghum, is a tropical plant species belonging to the sorghum genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sorghum tropicum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its roots can be dried and used as a powder for various medicinal applications.
